params.experience: the sharp bite of black pepper
params.detection: acts on the TRPV1 heat receptor, like a milder capsaicin

content_blocks.body_md:
Piperine is the molecule behind the bite of black pepper, mild on the Scoville
scale next to capsaicin but working on some of the same heat receptors. It also
slows the liver enzymes that break down other compounds, which is why pepper can
boost the potency of some drugs and supplements.
